siteTitle: Tok Ship Supply | Ship Chandlery & Vessel Provisioning in Turkey
siteDescription: Full-service ship chandler delivering provisions, stores, and marine supplies to vessels at every Turkish port. Cold chain logistics, 20+ years in the trade, round-the-clock availability.

hero.title: The Right Stores. Delivered on Time. Every Time.
hero.subtitle: Trusted ship chandler supplying provisions, deck stores, and marine equipment to vessels across all Turkish ports — with cold chain integrity and round-the-clock service.

services.title: What We Supply
services.subtitle: End-to-end chandlery services covering every supply category your vessel needs — from galley provisions to deck stores.

ports.title: Ports We Cover
ports.subtitle: Reliable ship supply services at 40+ ports along Turkey's entire coastline.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Every Port. Every Vessel. Every Time.
about.p1: Since 2005, Tok Ship Supply has been a trusted ship chandler operating across all Turkish ports. With more than two decades in the maritime supply trade, we deliver food provisions, cleaning stores, safety equipment, and technical supplies to both Turkish-flagged and international vessels.
about.p2: Headquartered in Samsun, we maintain a dedicated fleet of refrigerated and dry-cargo vehicles that serve the full length of Turkey's coastline — from the Black Sea to the Mediterranean, and from the Aegean to the Sea of Marmara.
about.p3: We built our reputation on doing two things well: sourcing quality products and getting them alongside on schedule. With over 28,000 successful deliveries to date, vessel operators and fleet managers count on us as a dependable supply partner.

whyUs.title: Why Ship Operators Choose Tok
whyUs.subtitle: The standards that set us apart in maritime provisioning.

items.title: Cold Chain Integrity
items.desc: Our refrigerated fleet keeps perishable provisions at spec temperature from warehouse to vessel, so your galley receives stores in perfect condition.

items.title: 24/7 Availability
items.desc: Vessels don't run on office hours and neither do we. Our operations team is standing by day and night, seven days a week.

items.title: Complete Chandlery Range
items.desc: Provisions, cabin stores, deck supplies, safety gear, and technical equipment — everything sourced and delivered from a single supplier.

items.title: On-Schedule Delivery
items.desc: We plan around your vessel's port call and berth window, so stores arrive when you need them — not a minute late.

items.title: Competitive Pricing
items.desc: Bulk purchasing power and lean operations let us offer sharp rates without cutting corners on quality.

items.title: Seasoned Team
items.desc: Our crew has 20+ years of hands-on experience in maritime supply logistics — we know the trade inside and out.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Need a quote, have a question, or ready to place an order? Reach out — we respond fast.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.addressValue: Karasamsun Mah. Yıldıray Çınar Bulvarı 848. Sokak No:2/B, İlkadım, Samsun, Turkey

items.q: Which ports do you deliver to?
items.a: We supply vessels at more than 40 ports across Turkey, covering the Black Sea, Sea of Marmara, Aegean, and Mediterranean coasts.

items.q: How quickly can you deliver after an order is placed?
items.a: In most cases we deliver within 24 hours of receiving a confirmed order. Turnaround depends on port location and stock availability, but we always aim to meet your vessel's schedule.

items.q: How do you handle cold chain provisions?
items.a: All perishable stores travel in our own refrigerated vehicles at controlled temperatures. We maintain strict cold chain protocols from warehouse to quayside to ensure freshness and food safety.

items.q: Is there a minimum order value?
items.a: No minimum order required. Whether it's a top-up for a short coastal run or a full provision for an ocean voyage, we're happy to supply.
Absolutely. We serve Turkish- and foreign-flagged vessels alike, with the same level of quality and service across the board.

items.q: What payment terms do you offer?
items.a: We accept bank transfer, credit card, and cash. For established accounts and fleet operators, we also offer credit terms — just ask our team for details.

aboutPage.metaTitle: About Tok Ship Supply | Ship Chandler Since 2005
aboutPage.metaDesc: Trusted ship chandler serving all Turkish ports since 2005. 28,000+ deliveries completed, 40+ ports covered, over 20 years of maritime supply expertise.
aboutPage.missionText: To keep vessels provisioned and crews well-supplied by delivering the highest-quality stores — swiftly, reliably, and at competitive rates — at every Turkish port.
aboutPage.visionText: To be Turkey's benchmark ship chandler, recognised industry-wide for international-standard service, operational reliability, and long-term partnership value.
aboutPage.fleetText: Our dedicated fleet of refrigerated and dry-cargo vehicles ensures stores reach the quayside in perfect condition — regardless of distance or weather.
aboutPage.historyText: What began in 2005 as a small team in Samsun has grown into one of Turkey's most trusted ship supply operations, now serving vessels at more than 40 ports nationwide.
